narrative_beat: Datacenter militar P&B com pergaminho e balança suspensa em dourado

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a cavernous military subterranean datacenter with endless server racks and blinking LEDs in desaturated black-and-white
subject.focal_point: a suspended glowing parchment with a Roman scale tipping violently toward death side
subject.secondary: The parchment hovers mid-air bathed in divine vertical golden light; the scale is forged in aged gold with crimson ribbons.
props: rows of server racks with blinking LEDs

composition.foreground: floating parchment and Roman scale in rich gold and crimson
composition.midground: air with light particles and smoke
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white server racks extending to vanishing point

lighting.key_light: divine vertical golden beam on parchment

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
